creator: parakleta@darkreality.org
text:
Created attachment 233216
Swap pcregrep in to replace gnugrep

The issue solved by:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=ea62bacb8ac8978cd8f265cc385fd55cec051d1a

can instead be solved by depending on pcregrep rather than gnugrep.  I would prefer this solution because pcregrep is already required by other programs and doesn't override any base programs, whereas gnugrep replaces with the base BSD grep.
